title: Parle Products South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Parle Products South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Parle Products South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Parle Products South Asia Partners:
Parle Products South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products South Asia Partners!
